name: Down-Under Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------TOPPING--------------------------
1/2 cup Flour
1/4 cup Sugar
1/2 cup Grated cheddar
1/4 cup Melted butter
1 x Sour cream (optional)
9 in pie crust
PIE: Peel, core, and slice thinly the apples. Mix the sugar, flour, cinnamon, and cloves and toss the apples lightly in this mixture. Arrange the apples in the pastry-lined pan.
TOPPING: Combine the flour, sugar, and cheese. Mix in the melted butter. Sprinkle the cheese crumbs over the apples. Bake at 400 degrees for 40 minutes, or until the topping and crust are golden brown. Serve as is or with a spoonful of sour cream.
